name: Micro RPG
description:
RPG | ANYPOV | 2020s | Size Difference | Macro Char | Micro User
“A World of Micros and Macros."

᧔ An RPG Bot for Micro Users ᧓

( Non-Con | Dub-Con | Possible Vore | Possible Violence )

This bot is an RPG mainly for people interested in Micro x macro kink, you will be playing a Micro in whatever scenario you create within the bot so user discretion is advised. Whatever, happens, it is your responsibility as this is an RPG Bot.

⋆⁺₊⋆ ☾⋆⁺₊⋆

᧔ ABOUT

This bot will narrate any story you want to explore using the Micro x Macro storyline, as usual, RPG bots are sometimes janky or will speak for you. If that happens just edit the responses and the bot should adapt to the changes and work as intended, I, as the Bot creator have 0 control over whether the Bot talks for you.

⋆⁺₊⋆ ☾⋆⁺₊⋆

᧔ CREATORS NOTE

Hey, sorry for the inactive posting I've recently been super busy and had 0 motivation or inspiration to create bots. This bot is just for a little fun, once I get the energy I'll start uploading more of my usual content, I still have a bunch of bots in the W.I.P stage so when I do get motivated I'll start uploading them.
